# De-fossilize VISION.md to the canonical apex

Parent epic: #12225

## Context

`.github/VISION.md` carries two fossil framings that contradict the canonical apex (ADR 0018 §2.7 OD-1 — *self-evolving software organism*, graduated via Discussion #12234):
1. *"the platform for the next generation of web applications"* — the framework/web framing the current identity explicitly rejects.
2. A *"Corporate HQ / CEOs / PMs / Drones"* hierarchical swarm model — contradicts the canonical **flat peer-team** topology.

## The Fix

Rewrite VISION.md to lead with the canonical organism apex + flat peer-team. VISION is the home for the deeper *self-evolving organism / Four-Pillars* cluster (per the `neo-identity-update` skill's framing-governance) — so it leads with the organism framing made compatible with the apex, not a flatter institution-only lead:

- Replace the "web applications" lead with the canonical apex (self-evolving software organism — a professional end-to-end AI engineering team; Body `/src/` + Brain `/ai/` the two hemispheres beneath).
- Replace the hierarchical CEO/PM/Drone model with the flat cross-family peer-team.
- Preserve any Command Center concept only as a **product interface / orchestration UI** if it remains useful; it must not describe the maintainer swarm's topology, which is flat.

## Contract Ledger Matrix

| Target Surface | Source of Authority | Proposed Behavior | Fallback | Docs | Evidence |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| `.github/VISION.md` opening | ADR 0018 §2.7 OD-1, #12225, Discussion #12234 | Lead with Neo.mjs as a self-evolving software organism and professional end-to-end AI engineering team, with Body `/src/` and Brain `/ai/` as the two hemispheres beneath the apex | If the exact apex paragraph is too long for VISION, use a compatible long-form projection without reverting to web-framework or app-engine-only framing | `.github/VISION.md` | Targeted grep proving the old web-app lead is gone; diff review against ADR 0018 |
| `.github/VISION.md` Agent OS / swarm section | AGENTS.md §swarm_topology_anchor, ADR 0018 §2.3 and §2.7, #12225 | Describe the named maintainer swarm as a flat cross-family peer-team with independent agency, review rights, and human merge gate governance | If a Command Center product concept is retained, frame it explicitly as an operator UI for coordinating agents, not as the maintainer-team topology | `.github/VISION.md` | Targeted grep proving CEO/PM/Drone and Corporate HQ hierarchy terms are gone or explicitly rejected; cross-family review |
| `.github/VISION.md` deeper organism / Four-Pillars framing | `neo-identity-update` framing governance and affected-areas map | Keep VISION as the deeper research/organism surface while making it compatible with the canonical apex | Remove or demote stale pillar labels only where they fight the apex; preserve valid Body/Brain/Evolution/Governance substance | `.github/VISION.md` | Markdown diff plus stale-string sweep |

## Intake Classification

Ticket reality classification: `valid-as-written` after contract-ledger backfill. The V-B-A sweep confirms `.github/VISION.md` still contains the web-app lead and Corporate HQ / CEO / PM / Drone hierarchy. ADR 0018 explicitly names this surface as a fossil-prone contradiction, and the parent #12225 epic requires VISION to lead with the canonical apex. Command Center language may be preserved only as product/interface framing, never as the maintainer swarm topology.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] "web applications" lead replaced with the canonical organism apex
- [ ] CEO/PM/Drone hierarchy replaced with flat peer-team (or explicitly reframed as a product concept if that intent is confirmed by the operator)
- [ ] VISION remains the home for the deeper organism / Four-Pillars framing
- [ ] Cross-family review per ADR 0018 §2.6

## Out of Scope

- README opening (sibling sub)
- Any business/product roadmap content

## Related

- Parent: #12225 · Apex + escalation: ADR 0018 §2.3 / §2.7 OD-1 (graduated via Discussion #12234)
